name: Sesame Seed Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Amaranth Sesame Seeds (lightly roasted on a cookie sheet in the oven)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together the oil, honey, egg or egg replacer, and vanilla extract.
2. Mix all the dry ingredients and add to the liquid mixture.
3. Stir in the soy milk.
4. Drop by the teaspoon onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
5. Flatten with a fork.
6. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
7. Makes approximately 48 cookies.
